scripts.syntax: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/index.js && node --check src/board-state.js && node --check src/game-room.js && node --check src/room-store.js
scripts.test:core: node --test test/protocol.test.js test/room-manager.test.js test/duel-flow.test.js test/provinces.test.js test/persistence.test.js test/websocket.test.js
scripts.check: npm run syntax && npm run test:core && npm run test:conformance
